HGSS.623.0000:
Deep inside far-off Indigo Plateau is
the Pokémon League.\f
I hear the best Trainers gather there
from around the country.
HGSS.623.0001:
There was this move I just had
to teach my Pokémon.\f
So I got the Move Deleter to make it
forget an HM move.
HGSS.623.0002:
They say that behind the Pokémon Gym is
a special cave for Gym Leaders to train\r
themselves.
